diagrams.title: Sequential Search Process
diagrams.description: Diagram showing sequential search scanning through array [15, 28, 31, 45, 63, 72, 89] searching for key 72
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how sequential search examines elements one by one until finding target or reaching end

diagrams.title: Brute Force String Matching Sliding Window
diagrams.description: Diagram showing pattern 'ABAB' sliding across text 'ABABABAB' with character-by-character comparisons at each shift
diagrams.purpose: Understand how brute force systematically tries pattern at every possible starting position
